body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 13 — paragraph 3 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3a. In order to comply with the obligations laid down in this Article, providers and users shall ensure a sufficient level of AI literacy in line with Article 4b.
parliament_text: 3a. In order to comply with the obligations laid down in this Article, providers and users shall ensure a sufficient level of AI literacy in line with Article 4b.
